metadata.description: Translate experience between startup/agile and structured corporate environments, with regional/cultural notes.

startup_to_corporate_ops.principle: Keep the impact; translate the method and controls language

translation_table.corporate_term: Handled cross-functional responsibilities with clear ownership (RACI)
Delivered within defined SLAs with change control (CAB)
Right-sized processes with documented SOPs and risk controls
Cross-functional teams with defined interfaces and governance

evidence_patterns: Defined SOPs and checklists improving consistency (First-Time-Right +X%)
Introduced KPIs and dashboards for throughput, quality, and risk
Aligned processes with audit/compliance (e.g., ISO, SoX)

expectations: Clarity of ownership (RACI), process stability, auditability
Risk management and change control (CAB), works councils (Betriebsrat) awareness where applicable
Evidence of measurable outcomes within formal structures
do: Use controls vocabulary: SOP, SLA, KPI, audit, compliance, risk register
Show how agile practices were documented and governed
avoid: Vague claims without metrics or governance

templates.summary: Translated agile startup experience into structured operations by defining SOPs, KPIs, and change controls; improved [metric] by [value] while meeting audit/compliance standards.
templates.bullet: Introduced [control/process] raising First-Time-Right from [X]% to [Y]% and reducing rework by [Z]% across [teams]
